title: Dimension Messages
description: Adds messages in chat that inform all players of inter-dimension travel.
body:
# Dimension Messages

This is a simple, lightweight datapack that adds a simple message in chat when a player travels between dimensions. It allows an easier way to be aware of where everyone is, especially in smaller smp servers.

The datapack should be compatible with everything!
___
![Dimension changing messages in chat](https://i.imgur.com/cBpIxYq.png)
___
